reasoning_model_1: The model successfully adopts the required paralinguistic feature 'whisper' (耳语). The voice is breathy and low volume, perfectly matching the scenario of hiding or being secretive. The core feature expression is vivid (Score 3 level), but the content accuracy issue drops it slightly.
reasoning_model_2: The model perfectly follows the text script '快走，有人来了。' without any additions or omissions. model_comparison: Both models successfully implement the 'whisper' style required by the prompt. T2 is superior because it adheres strictly to the requested text content.
